li.label: diaper showing
li.description: My diaper is visible. Aware of every glance.

li.label: protection showing
li.description: My protection is showing and everyone can see it. Getting harder to care properly.

li.label: diapew showing
li.description: My diapew is showing. Can't wemember why dat used to bother me so much.

li.label: padded
li.description: Diapew showing. Dat's fine.

li.label: padded
li.description: Soft. Safe. *content*

li.label: exposed
li.description: Everyone can see my diaper. Every single person. Cannot stand this.

li.label: protection showing
li.description: My protection is visible to everyone and I cannot care about it properly anymore.

li.label: should cover dis
li.description: My diapew is showin. Da bit dat knows dat is still twying.

li.label: padded
li.description: Diapew showing. Somefing about dat feels wrong.

li.label: padded
li.description: Soft. *content*

li.label: on display
li.description: Diaper visible. Not apologising for it. Let them look.

li.label: showing it
li.description: Protection visible. Something about that feels like a victory.

li.label: padded and free
li.description: My diapew is showing. Good. Better dan good.

li.label: padded
li.description: Protected. Showing. Good.

li.label: padded
li.description: Safe. Padded. *cooing*

li.label: exposed
li.description: My diaper is visible. Part thrill, part discomfort. Cannot fully separate them.

li.label: protection showing
li.description: They can see my protection. Something about that pulls at me.

li.label: diapew showing
li.description: My diapew is visible. Dat feels wight somehow.

li.label: padded
li.description: Padded. Comfy. Good.

li.label: soft and safe
li.description: Soft warm. Safe. *cooing*

li.label: soiled diaper showing
li.description: My diaper is dirty and everyone can see it. I want to disappear.

li.label: dirty diaper showing
li.description: My diaper is used and it's showing. Everyone around me knows.

li.label: dirty diapew showing
li.description: My diapew is dirty and it's showing. Don't wike dis at all.

li.label: dirty diapew out
li.description: Dirty diapew is showing. Dat's bad.

li.label: heavy and showing
li.description: Heavy and showing. *squirming*

li.label: complete humiliation
li.description: My soiled diaper is in plain sight of everyone here. There are no words for this.

li.label: worst possible
li.description: My used diaper is visible to everyone. Cannot believe this is happening.

li.label: dirty diapew showing
li.description: My dirty diapew is showing. Da bit dat hates dis is still very loud.

li.label: dirty diapew out
li.description: Dirty diapew showing. Dat's wrong. Very wrong.

li.label: heavy and showing
li.description: Heavy. Showing. *fussing*

li.label: dirty and visible
li.description: Soiled diaper on full display. They can deal with it.

li.label: used and showing
li.description: Used diaper visible. That's even better than clean.

li.label: dirty diapew out
li.description: Dirty diapew showing. Good.

li.label: dirty diapew
li.description: Dirty diapew out. Fine.

li.label: heavy and showing
li.description: Heavy and showing. *content*

li.label: used and exposed
li.description: My used diaper is visible. The shame and the thrill of it are impossible to separate.

li.label: used and showing
li.description: They can see my used diaper. Something about that pulls very hard.

li.label: warm diapew showing
li.description: My warm diapew is showing. Dat feels wight somehow.

li.label: warm and showing
li.description: Warm diapew out. Good.

li.label: warm and showing
li.description: Warm. Heavy. Showing. *content*
